name: Can I file workers comp if I got hurt at my job in West Valley City even if it's partly my fault?
description: Yes, Utah's no-fault workers' comp covers you even if partly at fault.[2]

mainEntity.name: Can I file workers comp if I got hurt at my job in West Valley City even if it's partly my fault?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Utah's no-fault workers' comp covers you even if partly at fault.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, Utah workers' compensation is no-fault, covering injuries regardless of your partial responsibility.** It protects employees from proving employer negligence.[2][10] Key factors: Covers medical bills, lost wages, disability; excludes injuries from intoxication or intentional self-harm. Report promptly, seek treatment, file a claim. No-fault system simplifies access but limits lawsuits against employers. Consult an attorney for complex fault issues.
